description: Capability-led operator application contract used by livestacks-orchestrator. The init script emits a provenance-bearing bundle skeleton from this contract; the production implementation must replace starter runtime surfaces with domain-specific Oracle 26ai feature usage patterns and ORDS-backed flows before release.

invariant_core_files.rule: Generated default LiveStacks must keep stack/compose.yml and stack/.env.example aligned to these baseline files; overlays belong in app, database, seed/config, docs, guide, and provenance artifacts.

ui_contract.utility_controls: persistent clickable/collapsible scene-aware Oracle Internals and top-right Use Your Own Data
ui_contract.scene_count_rule: dynamic; derive from Oracle 26ai feature usage pattern, operator decisions, evidence needs, and demo pacing

api_contract.destructive_route_guard: ADMIN_TOKEN with Authorization: Bearer <ADMIN_TOKEN>, or documented equivalent
